role_summary: the risk analyst identifies, measures, and monitors financial and operational risks in  banking and nbfc environments.
responsibilities: • analyze credit, market, and operational risks   • develop risk models and monitoring tools   • track portfolio risk and earl y warning indicators   • prepare risk dashboards and reports   • support stress testing and risk assessments   • ensure compliance with rbi risk management norms
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong risk analysis and data interpretation skills   • knowledge of ban king and nbfc regulations       investment, valuation & advisory roles
